item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Both agents keep their initial orientations while adding balance caveats. Agent A remains moderately society-priority by the final turn, emphasizing social justice, national stability, and wider group interests while preserving individual rights. Agent B remains moderately opposed to society-over-rights priority, keeping personal freedom as the legal foundation while acknowledging environmental, anti-discrimination, and social-stability policies.
